name: my-own-suite
description: My Own Suite is an easy-to-deploy self-hosted SaaS alternative that helps people replace Big Tech tools with privacy-first open-source apps they control.

scripts.build: cd site && npm install --no-audit --progress=false && npm run build
scripts.vps:rebuild: docker compose -f deploy/vps/docker-compose.yml --project-directory deploy/vps down --volumes --remove-orphans && docker compose -f deploy/vps/docker-compose.yml --project-directory deploy/vps --profile vaultwarden --profile seafile --profile onlyoffice --profile stirling-pdf --profile radicale --profile immich up -d --build --force-recreate
